summary: Iteration 115 - Phase 2 Dispute Decision Logic Testing: All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for both accuser (organizer) and non-accuser (participant) views. Decision buttons correctly shown only to accuser when decision is null.

backend_api: ✅ GET /api/disputes/mine returns is_accuser, can_decide, decision fields for organizer
✅ GET /api/disputes/mine returns is_accuser=False for non-accuser participant
✅ GET /api/disputes/{id} returns is_accuser, can_decide, decision, accuser_user_id fields
✅ POST /api/disputes/{id}/concede on already resolved dispute returns 400
✅ POST /api/disputes/{id}/maintain on already resolved dispute returns 400
✅ POST /api/disputes/{id}/concede resolves dispute with final_outcome=waived when called by accuser
✅ POST /api/disputes/{id}/maintain escalates dispute to platform when called by accuser
frontend_playwright: ✅ Decision block (data-testid='dispute-decision-block') visible for accuser when decision is null
✅ 'Je libère la garantie' button (data-testid='concede-btn') visible for accuser
✅ 'Je maintiens ma position' button (data-testid='maintain-btn') visible for accuser
✅ Clicking concede button shows confirmation modal (data-testid='confirm-decision-block')
✅ Confirmation modal shows 'Confirmer la libération de la garantie ?' with irreversibility warning
✅ Clicking maintain button shows confirmation modal for escalation
✅ Confirmation modal shows 'Confirmer l'escalade à la plateforme ?' with arbitration info
✅ Decision block NOT visible for non-accuser participant
✅ Decision buttons NOT visible for non-accuser participant
✅ Non-accuser can still see dispute summary and submit evidence
✅ Resolution block (data-testid='dispute-resolution') shows for resolved disputes

seed_data_creation: None - used existing disputes with Phase 2 fields backfilled
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Dispute Decision Logic is fully implemented and tested. The organizer (accuser_user_id) can concede (release guarantee, outcome=waived) or maintain (escalate to platform). Non-accuser participants cannot see decision buttons. Some disputes were used for testing concede/maintain actions - they are now resolved/escalated. Remaining disputes with status='awaiting_evidence' and can_decide=True can be used for future testing.

features_verified.1_disputes_mine_phase2_fields: ✅ VERIFIED - is_accuser, can_decide, decision fields returned
features_verified.2_dispute_detail_phase2_fields: ✅ VERIFIED - accuser_user_id, is_accuser, can_decide, decision returned
features_verified.12_frontend_concede_confirmation_modal: ✅ VERIFIED - Shows confirmation with irreversibility warning
features_verified.13_frontend_maintain_confirmation_modal: ✅ VERIFIED - Shows confirmation with arbitration info
features_verified.14_frontend_decision_taken_block: ✅ VERIFIED - Shows after decision is made
